from __future__ import annotations

def repeated_open_read_close_of_same_small_file_in_single_workflow_positive():
    path = "meta.txt"
    with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
        first = handle.read().strip()
    with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
        second = handle.read().strip()
    return first == second
